title: How quants really make money.
summary: QFEX is a 24/7 perpetual futures exchange founded in 2025 by Annanay Kapila and Joshua Wharton offering up to 50x leverage on US stocks, forex, and commodities without broker intermediaries. The platform raised a $9.5M seed round in March 2026 led by General Catalyst, valuing the company at $95M.
